summary: Frontend-only testing of Puzzle Master Blast mobile game. All major features verified working: Home screen with 4 game modes, Classic Mode, Timed Mode, Tournament screen, Themes/Skins modal, Daily Rewards modal, and in-game UI components.

issues: useNativeDriver not supported (expected for Expo web)

critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings present but non-blocking - useNativeDriver falls back to JS animation on web
expo-av deprecation warning - should migrate to expo-audio/expo-video before SDK 54
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend features tested and working. AdMob functionality is MOCKED for web preview (works on native builds only). App is mobile-first React Native (Expo) running on web.

home_screen.details: All 4 game modes visible (Klasik Mod, Zamanlı Mod, Çok Oyunculu, Turnuva), bottom navigation (Sıralama, Ödül, Temalar, Görevler), animated logo, user stats display

classic_mode.details: Game screen loads with 8x8 board, score display, XP bar, power-ups bar (bomb, shuffle), draggable block pieces at bottom, pause/mute/quests buttons in header

timed_mode.details: Timer visible (2:57 countdown from 3 min), all game elements same as classic mode

tournament_screen.details: Shows 'Haftalık Turnuva', countdown timer (3 gün 14 saat), prize table (1st: 10K, 2nd: 5K, 3rd: 2.5K, 4-10: 500), leaderboard with mock players, 'Turnuvaya Katıl' join button

themes_modal.details: Opens 'Blok Temaları' modal with 8+ themes: Klasik (active), Neon Gece, Altın, Okyanus, Gün Batımı, Galaksi, Şeker, Orman. Shows ad cost for locked themes

daily_rewards_modal.details: Auto-appears on home load, shows 7-day calendar, current day highlighted, today's reward (50 XP, 100 coins), 'Ödülü Al!' claim button works

power_ups_bar.details: 3 power-up buttons visible during gameplay (bomb, shuffle, extra)

score_and_xp_display.details: Score: 0, High Score: 0, Level indicator, XP progress bar (0/100 XP)

mocked_functionality.AdMob: Banner, interstitial, and rewarded ads are MOCKED for web preview - functional on native builds only
mocked_functionality.note: Production builds will have real AdMob integration
